## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest -v` / `just test`)
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] No real homelab data (hostnames, IPs, usernames, MACs) in fixtures, tests, or docs — see
      the test data policy in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes
